ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_credits" (
  "tax_credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax credit */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax credit program */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Filing status (e.g., individual, joint) */,
  "num_kids" INTEGER /* Number of children required to qualify for the credit */,
  "rule_year" INTEGER /* Year the rule was implemented */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax credit is applicable */,
  "countable_income" TEXT /* Type of income that is countable towards the credit */,
  "age_limit_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age required to qualify for the credit */,
  "age_limit_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age required to qualify for the credit */,
  "investment_income_eligibility" INTEGER /* Eligibility for investment income */,
  "max_credit" INTEGER /* Maximum credit amount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tax credit program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Additional criteria for eligibility */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying for the tax credit */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* List of documents required for application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tax credit program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tax credit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tax credit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_credit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_limits" (
  "income_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income limit */,
  "tax_credit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax credit */,
  "income_bin1_min" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the first bin */,
  "income_bin1_max" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the first bin */,
  "income_bin2_min" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the second bin */,
  "income_bin2_max" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the second bin */,
  "income_bin3_min" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the third bin */,
  "income_bin3_max" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the third bin */,
  "income_bin4_min" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the fourth bin */,
  "income_bin4_max" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the fourth bin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the income limit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the income limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_limits_tax_credit_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_credit_id") REFERENCES tax_credits ("tax_credit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_in_out_rates" (
  "phase_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase rate */,
  "tax_credit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax credit */,
  "phase_in_rate" REAL /* Phase-in rate */,
  "phase_out_rate" REAL /* Phase-out rate */,
  "phase_in_threshold" INTEGER /* Income threshold at which the phase-in rate starts */,
  "phase_out_threshold" INTEGER /* Income threshold at which the phase-out rate starts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the phase rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the phase rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_in_out_rates_tax_credit_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_credit_id") REFERENCES tax_credits ("tax_credit_id")
)
